title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: CARE OREGON CLUB AT ROCKWOOD HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing daily physical activity, teaching good nutrition, and helping to develop healthy relationships. 454 SE 165th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 2pm-6pm Email (360) 954-1428 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 954-1428 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Monthly sliding scale membership based on income. Program fees vary; scholarships and financial assistance are available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Gresham (Rockwood) SITE HOURS: Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUBS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
